---
title: "TitalGPUReproduction"
author: "Samyoga Bhattarai"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown
The paper uses survival analysis methods (Kaplan-Meier + Cox). So, installing and loading the required libraries.
```{r}
#installing required packages
#install.packages(c("tidyverse", "lubridate", "Survival", "survminer", "forestmodel"))

#loading the packages
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(forestmodel)
```


Loading the dataset
```{r}
```
